/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,rrm_msgs_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so -o rosidl_generator_py/rrm_msgs/rrm_msgs_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/rrm_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c__pyext.dir/rosidl_generator_py/rrm_msgs/_rrm_msgs_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/rrm/build/rrm_msgs/rosidl_generator_py/rrm_msgs:/home/rrm/build/rrm_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: rosidl_generator_py/rrm_msgs/librrm_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so librrm_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so librrm_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
